overall.description: First-person perspective from inside an NCART metro train in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City at night. The journey includes departing Glen North station, traversing elevated tracks through the neon-lit cityscape, stopping at Japantown South, and continuing through dense urban canyons with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART metro platform at Glen North station

events.description: train begins moving from stationary position at Glen North platform
train exits the covered station area into the open tunnel

agents.ego_description: sitting inside the NCART train cabin observing the platform departure from Glen North station

entered.detail: illuminated metro line display showing the NCART network in red and yellow
concrete station platform with yellow safety striping and NCART signage
structural columns supporting the station roof along the platform edge
red illuminated station name sign visible through the train window

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside an NCART train at Glen North station. The digital map glows on the right panel as the train starts moving, passing the empty concrete platform with its red neon signage. The train accelerates through the sheltered station environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track through downtown Night City

events.description: train exits tunnel onto elevated tracks revealing the city skyline
automated announcement indicates next stop is Japantown South

agents.ego_description: traveling on elevated tracks through the city, observing skyscrapers and neon lights through the window

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows forming the Night City skyline
metal support structures of the elevated railway system
aerodyne vehicle flying between buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The train emerges onto elevated tracks, revealing the sprawling Night City skyline. Skyscrapers with illuminated windows stretch into the hazy night sky while the train passes over the city streets below. Metal support girders frame the left side of the view as the train maintains steady speed.

events.description: train decelerates as it approaches Japantown South station platform
train comes to a complete stop at the station platform
train accelerates departing Japantown South station

agents.ego_description: arriving at Japantown South station, coming to a brief stop, then departing the platform

entered.detail: concrete platform with distinctive Japantown architectural elements and signage
overhead roof structure covering the station platform

segments.scene_description: The train slows and arrives at Japantown South station, pulling alongside the covered platform. After a brief stop, the train accelerates away from the station, passing back out into the open track.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track through dense commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: train enters dense urban canyon with close building proximity
train passes through building underpass temporarily narrowing the view

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey through a dense commercial district filled with bright holographic advertisements and neon signage

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisement displaying colorful product imagery
tall building with illuminated corporate logos and window lights
covered section where the track passes through or under building structures

segments.scene_description: Departing Japantown South, the train travels through a dense urban canyon lined with massive holographic billboards and neon advertisements. The track passes close to building facades and through brief covered sections, showcasing the dense cyberpunk architecture of Night City's commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside an NCART train as it transitions from a sheltered station into the expansive neon skyline of Night City. It begins at Glen North station, where a glowing digital map illuminates the interior as the train pulls away from an empty concrete platform marked by red neon signage. As the train accelerates, the enclosed station environment gradually gives way to the open air. The scene then expands onto elevated tracks, revealing a sprawling cityscape of skyscrapers with illuminated windows stretching into a hazy night sky. Metal support girders frame the view as the train maintains its steady speed, gliding high above the city streets below.

The shot follows a continuous journey from a momentary pause at a transit hub into a high-speed glide through a neon-saturated urban corridor. It begins as the train slows to a halt at the covered platform of Japantown South station, remaining stationary for a brief interval. As the train accelerates away from the station, the enclosed environment opens up to the open tracks of the city. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon, where the camera glides past massive holographic billboards and vibrant neon advertisements. This movement continues through a series of brief covered sections and close building facades, immersing the viewer in the towering cyberpunk architecture of the commercial district.
